Curriculum ← Unit 1

📚 Unit 1: Additional Resources

Deep dive reading on AI disruption, PMM transformation, and skill development

📖 Deep Dives from Future of PMM

🤖
Where Do You Sit? Understanding Your AI Working Posture
A deep dive into Helen Edwards' Cognitive Sovereignty framework and what it means for product marketers navigating AI collaboration.
10 min read
 🎯
The Full-Stack Buyer
How AI is creating a new type of enterprise buyer who researches, evaluates, and decides with unprecedented speed and depth.
12 min read
 🔌
What is MCP? The Protocol Reshaping AI Integration
Understanding Model Context Protocol and why it matters for how AI agents discover and interact with enterprise software.
8 min read

📰 Relevant Daily Digests

📅
March 25: Claude Cowork Fallout
Coverage of the Anthropic demo that triggered the software stock selloff and what analysts are saying about the future of SaaS.
 📅
March 27: The Counter-Narrative Emerges
Gartner's $6T forecast and why enterprise software spending continues to accelerate despite AI disruption fears.
 📅
March 30: PMM Skills in Transition
How leading companies are rethinking product marketing roles and competencies for the agentic era.

🔗 External Sources

📄
Wall Street Is Convinced AI Will Kill SaaS
Fortune's analysis of the software stock selloff and whether the fears are justified.
Fortune · External link
 📄
Is SaaS Dead? Rethinking the Future of Software
IDC's research on the shift from seat-based pricing to consumption and outcome models.
IDC · External link
 📄
Enterprise Tech Spending to Cross $6 Trillion
Gartner's forecast breakdown and what's driving the growth in enterprise IT investment.
Computerworld · External link
 📄
Enterprise Software Spend Will Grow 15.2%
SaaStr's breakdown of where the software growth is coming from and what it means for vendors.
